_comments.AzureWebJobsStorage: Required by Functions runtime. Use 'UseDevelopmentStorage=true' for Azurite.
_comments.STORAGE: Connection string for Table/Blob storage. For local dev with Azurite, use the full connection string, this is publicly known.
_comments.CRM_TENANT_ID: Azure AD tenant ID. Already set in Azure SWA app settings for production.
_comments.CRM_CLIENT_ID: App Registration client ID for CRM access. Already set in Azure SWA app settings.
_comments.CRM_CLIENT_SECRET: App Registration client secret. Already set in Azure SWA app settings.
